title: Nifeliz AM24 Formula 1 Racing Car Building Set Age 16+, 1:8 Scale Collectible Car Model Set for Adults, Home or Office Décor, Gifts for men, Women, Him or Her (2351 PCS, NF10279)
features: Enjoy the thrill of assembling this AM24 racing car model. Designed to replicate authentic design elements, it's sure to delight adults and bring the joy of building to life.
Steer the model with its interactive linkage, turning the wheel just like a real car. Combined with the well-designed suspension, this feature adds to the building experience for car enthusiasts.
With a differential, a 6-cylinder engine with moving pistons and a unique paint scheme, every detail is designed to capture the essence of high-performance vehicles.
With authentic stickers, the car model is ideal for display in your home or office. Its eye-catching design make it an impressive focal point.
A thoughtful gift for adults, motorsport fans and those who enjoy intricate and meaningful projects. A great addition to any model car collection.
description: Product Description DISCOVER THE JOY OF THE AM24 RACE CAR Racing car model to collect or display Transform your space with this AM24 race car model set, elegantly displayed on your desk or shelf. This set not only celebrates your craftsmanship but also serves as a conversation starter, showcasing your passion for detail and elegance. Challenging construction project for adults Immerse yourself in the fulfilling process of assembling this racing car model. With each piece you connect, you’ll rediscover the joy of building, unlocking a sense of accomplishment and satisfaction that comes from seeing your creation come to life on the table before you. Previous page Next page 1 UNIQUE COLOR 2 STEERING LINKAGE 3 REALISTIC ENGINE 4 DETAILED STICKERS 5 DISPLAY SET Nifeliz Large Cars Series Delight in Building and Displaying this Car Model Toy ​Experience the joy of assembling the AM24 car model set. Every adult enthusiast will enjoy the exciting building process, creating a model that's both fun to assemble and impressive to display. The set makes it a remarkable addition to any collection. Once completed, the whole set becomes a striking decorative piece, ideal for showcasing your craftsmanship in any room. How many pieces does it come with? The Nifeliz AM24 racing car model is made up of 2351 pieces. What are the dimensions of the finished model? Once assembled, the racing car model measures 67.1*26.7*12.2 cm, making it a stunning display set. What is the estimated time to complete the assembly? The estimated time to complete this car model toy is 9.5 hours, although this may vary depending on your familiarity with building toys. Is the instruction manual easy to understand? Yes, you can follow the instructions to open the bag with the step number on it and assemble it step by step.
